zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hutchins於1600年出生在英國賀特福爾韋爾時，她的父親Robert Hutchins16歲，母親Mary Farley13歲。她於大約1635年與Richard Craddock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1665年12月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可瓦林納享年65歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州亨利可瓦林納亨利可 帕里什 邱奇 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hutchins于1600年出生在英国賀特福爾韋爾时，她的父亲Robert Hutchins16岁，母亲Mary Farley13岁。她于大约1635年与Richard Craddock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1665年12月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可瓦林納享年65岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州亨利可瓦林納亨利可 帕里什 邱奇 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hutcheon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s; see Houchin .

variants.name: Hutcheon
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Angus): variant of   Houchin  .

variants.name: Hutchings
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Hutchins  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: County seat
historicEvents.description: Varina was made Henrico county seat in 1634.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hutchins was born in 1600, in Ware, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Robert Hutchins, was 16 and her mother, Mary Farley, was 13. She married Richard Craddock about 1635, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 14 December 1665, in Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 65, and was buried in Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hutchins est née en 1600, à Ware, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Hutchins, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Mary Farley, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Craddock environ 1635, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 14 décembre 1665, à Varina, Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginie, États-Unis.

Sie hat um 1635 in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America Richard Craddock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 14. it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hutchins è nata il nel 1600 nel Ware, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Robert Hutchins, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Mary Farley, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Richard Craddock circa 1635, nel Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 14 dicembre 1665, nel Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hutchinsが1600年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワーで生まれた時，父Robert Hutchinsは16歳，母Mary Farleyは13歳であった。約1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコでRichard Craddockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1665年12月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコバーイナで65歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州ヘンリコバーイナヘンリコ パーイッシュ チャーチ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hutchins(이)가 1600년 영국 허트퍼드실르 워에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Hutchins(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Farley(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1635년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Richard Craddock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1665년 12월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코 바리나에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 헨리코 바리나 헨리코 파리시 c후르치 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hutchins nasceu em 1600, em Ware, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Hutchins, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Mary Farley, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Craddock aproximadamente 1635, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1665, em Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hutchins родилась в 1600 г. в местности вар, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Hutchins было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Farley, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Craddock около 1635 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 14 декабря 1665 г. в местности варина, хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности хенрику пэриш чурч кеметири, варина, хенрику, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Richard Craddock aproximadamente 1635, en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1665, en Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
